_doc: Engineering-task contract template — H.5.7. Applied to ANY persona doing engineering work (vs audit work). Lower thresholds than audit contracts; severity sections + audit-keywords NOT required. Caller passes --contract <this-path> at verify time. See commands/build-team.md Step 7 for the convention. Generic-shared-contract precedent: challenger.contract.json (H.2.3).

kb_scope._doc: kb_scope is not load-bearing for engineering work; spawn-conventions covers report shape. Persona-specific kb_scope can be added at spawn time via --kb-scope flag if relevant.

functional._doc: Engineering tasks: >=1 finding sufficient (vs audit's 2-3). A simple cleanup may have 1 LOW finding; padding to 3 produces noise. Findings are H3 sub-sections under severity blocks (e.g., '### LOW-1: ...'), not free-form Summary text. Reports with only a '## Summary' and no '### LOW-N:' heading will fail F3.
Engineering tasks: >=1 file citation (file you modified, created, or read). Audit's 4-6 threshold doesn't fit small-scope work.

fallbackAcceptable: Task scope was small (e.g., <50 LoC delta or <10-line doc edit) — 1 finding + 1 citation is genuine signal, not padding
Single-file doc surgery, config tweak, or trivial fix — no severity sections needed
Persona-specific KB doc not load-bearing for the engineering task — proceed with kb:hets/spawn-conventions only
